Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a process model in DECLARE constraints for a loan application review process We are to add new constraints to mitigate bias based on sensitive attributes ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are to consider that the process might be biased For example a FinalDecision which we assume can be either Approve or Reject might be influenced by sensitive attributes

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The example given in the instructions suggests If a decision step occurs for a sensitive applicant eg Approve Minority or Reject Minority ensure a ManualReview activity always coexists in the trace Ensure that certain decision steps Approve Reject cannot immediately follow an activity disclosing sensitive attributes eg CheckApplicantRace without first performing a BiasMitigationCheck Prevent a direct succession from a sensitive attribute event eg CheckApplicantRace to a decision event Reject to avoid immediate biased outcomes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We are to preserve the DECLARE dictionary structure

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The model has existence StartApplication and FinalDecision must occur init StartApplication is the start coexistence StartApplication and FinalDecision must coexist response StartApplication must be followed by RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo must be followed by FinalDecision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: However note that the current model does not have any activities related to sensitive attributes or bias checks Therefore we must first introduce these activities as part of the constraints

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The instructions imply that we are to add constraints that involve new activities like BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview and activities that break down decisions by sensitive attributes Since we are to mitigate bias we must assume that the process can be extended with these activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We want to ensure that if there is a decision for a sensitive applicant then a ManualReview must occur We can use coexistence for this

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We want to ensure that a decision like Approve or Reject cannot immediately follow CheckApplicantRace without a BiasMitigationCheck in between We can use precedence for BiasMitigationCheck before Approve and Reject and response for CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are going to use two constraints response for CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck This ensures that if a sensitive attribute is checked then a bias mitigation check must occur at some point after precedence for BiasMitigationCheck before Approve and Reject This ensures that a bias check must occur before a decision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can assume that the process has the following activities StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Approve Reject Approve Minority Reject Minority

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We want to ensure that if a sensitive attribute is checked CheckApplicantRace then a BiasMitigationCheck must occur response A decision Approve Reject Approve Minority Reject Minority must be preceded by a BiasMitigationCheck precedence Additionally for the sensitive decision variants Approve Minority Reject Minority a ManualReview must occur coexistence

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We also want to avoid direct succession from CheckApplicantRace to a decision We can use nonchainsuccession for that

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We are going to update coexistence add two more for the sensitive decisions response add one for CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck precedence add four for each decision activity to be preceded by BiasMitigationCheck nonchainsuccession add four for CheckApplicantRace to each decision activity
